description: Environment-specific error patterns. These trigger check_environment recommendations instead of code fixes.

patterns.rootCause: Code uses Python features not available in the installed version (walrus operator needs 3.8+, match/case needs 3.10+, f-string = needs 3.8+).
patterns.prescription: Run check_environment to verify Python version. Upgrade Python or use pyenv to switch versions.
patterns.codeBlock:
# Check Python version:
python3 --version

# If too old, upgrade:
# Windows: choco install python3 -y
# macOS: brew install python@3.12
# Linux: sudo apt install python3 -y

patterns.rootCause: Module not found — likely no virtual environment is active, so packages installed globally or in another venv are not accessible.
patterns.prescription: Run setup_environment to create a virtual environment and install dependencies. For manual setup: python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt

patterns.match: SyntaxError: Unexpected token '\?\.'|structuredClone is not defined|fetch is not defined|requires Node\.js\s+>=?\s*(\d+)|ERR_UNKNOWN_BUILTIN_MODULE
patterns.rootCause: Code uses Node.js features not available in the installed version. Optional chaining (?.) needs Node 14+, structuredClone needs 17+, fetch needs 18+.
patterns.prescription: Run check_environment to verify Node.js version. Use nvm or fnm to switch to a compatible version.

patterns.match: JAVA_HOME is not set|No such file or directory.*java|JAVA_HOME environment variable is not defined|JAVA_HOME is not valid
patterns.rootCause: JAVA_HOME environment variable is not set. Java build tools (Maven, Gradle) require it to locate the JDK.
patterns.prescription: Run setup_environment for Java to configure JAVA_HOME. Set it to your JDK installation directory.

patterns.match: error: toolchain '.*' is not installed|error\[E0658\]: .* is experimental|edition (\d{4}) is unsupported|can't find crate
patterns.rootCause: The Rust toolchain or edition required by this project is not installed or configured.
patterns.prescription: Run rustup show to see installed toolchains. Use rustup default stable to install the latest stable toolchain.

patterns.match: go: go\.mod requires go >= (\d+\.\d+)|cannot find package|module requires Go (\d+\.\d+)
patterns.rootCause: The Go module requires a newer version of Go than what is installed.
patterns.prescription: Run check_environment to verify Go version. Update Go to the required version.

patterns.match: npm warn.*peer dep|ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree|Could not resolve dependency
patterns.rootCause: npm dependency resolution conflict. Peer dependencies are incompatible.
patterns.prescription: Try: npm install --legacy-peer-deps. Or switch to pnpm which handles peer deps better: npx pnpm install.

patterns.match: '(\w+)'\s+is not recognized|command not found:\s+(\w+)|No such file or directory.*/(\w+)$
patterns.rootCause: A required tool is not installed on this system.
patterns.prescription: Run check_environment to see what's missing and get OS-specific install instructions.
